@if (vm$ | async; as vm) {

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Opere in asta' : 'Works at auction' }}

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Aste pubbliche' : 'Public auctions' }}

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Qui alcune mie opere attendono la casa, lo sguardo e la storia che verranno dopo di me.' : 'Here, some of my works await the home, the gaze and the story that will come after me.' }}

@if (vm.auctions.length > 0) {
@for (auction of vm.auctions; track auction.id) {
{{ getStatusLabel(vm.language, auction.publicStatus) }} @if (auction.isFeatured) { {{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'In evidenza' : 'Featured' }} }

{{ auction.artwork.title[vm.language] || auction.artwork.title.it }}

@if (auction.artwork.year) { {{ auction.artwork.year }} } @if (auction.artwork.technique[vm.language] || auction.artwork.technique.it) { · {{ auction.artwork.technique[vm.language] || auction.artwork.technique.it }} }

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Apertura' : 'Opening' }}
{{ auction.openingAt | date : 'd MMMM y, HH:mm' : undefined : vm.language }}
{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Chiusura' : 'Closing' }}
{{ auction.closingAt | date : 'd MMMM y, HH:mm' : undefined : vm.language }}
{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Base d asta' : 'Starting bid' }}
{{ auction.startingBidAmount | currency : auction.currency : 'symbol' : '1.0-0' }}
{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Rialzo minimo' : 'Minimum increment' }}
{{ auction.minimumIncrementAmount | currency : auction.currency : 'symbol' : '1.0-0' }}

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Apri la scheda asta' : 'Open auction page' }}

}
} @else {

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Nessuna asta pubblica al momento' : 'No public auctions right now' }}

{{ vm.language === 'it' ? 'Quando una nuova asta verra resa pubblica, apparira qui insieme al collegamento diretto alla relativa opera.' : 'When a new auction is made public, it will appear here together with the direct link to the related artwork.' }}

}
}
